/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/test_add_order.cc.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/test_cancel_order.cc.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/test_matching.cc.o -o tests  liblob_core.a /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd
